name: Great House Citadel Circle
summary: The public ring of matriarchal Great Houses whose citadels define status, rivalries, and production power on Psanan.
motive: Preserve House precedence while extracting strength, loyalty, and legitimacy from volcanic endurance.
power_relations: Interlocked with Queen’s Court but constantly negotiating with one another
current_pressure: public need for rebuilding after damage
visible_membership_base: Matriarchs, house captains, sworn retainers, craft champions.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: House prestige can turn every shortage, burial, or rebuilding effort into a competition for dominance.
